df_trades['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df_trades['Date'], errors='coerce')
df_trades = df_trades.dropna(subset=['Date'])

import pandas as pd
import json

var_tool_query_db_1KyezKldyR8NMVTo4Do3 = var_tool_query_db_1KyezKldyR8NMVTo4Do3["query_db_response"]["result"]

df = pd.DataFrame(var_tool_query_db_1KyezKldyR8NMVTo4Do3)

df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors="coerce")
df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])


na_indices = ["IXIC", "GSPTSE", "NYA"]

df_na = df[df["Index"].isin(na_indices)]

results = {}
for index in na_indices:
    df_index = df_na[df_na["Index"] == index]
    up_days = len(df_index[df_index["Close"] > df_index["Open"]])
    down_days = len(df_index[df_index["Close"] < df_index["Open"]])

qualified = [k for k, v in results.items() if v["up"] > v["down"]]
